path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali is the most fearful in the presence and way of Allah.jpeg
text: hakim:4654 - Ahmad b. Jafar al-Qati1> ‘Abdullah b. Ahmad b. Hanbal from my father > Ya'qub b. Ibrahim b. Sa'd from my father > Ibn Ishaq > ‘Abdullah b. ‘Abd al- Rahman b. Ma'mar Abt Tuwalah al-AnsarT > Sulayman b. Muhammad b. Kab b. ‘Ujrah > Zaynab b. Abti SaTd > Aba Sa1d al-Khudri [Machine] Ali ibn Abi Talib complained to the Messenger of Allah ££ | so he stood among us as a speaker and I heard him say, "O people, do not complain about Ali, for by Allah, he is the most fearful in the presence of Allah and in the way of Allah." @ - Sound (Dhahabi)
